name: Never Fail Toffee
recipeIngredient: 1 large Milk chocolate bar, broken into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, butter, and water in a heavy saucepan.
2. Cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture reaches the soft-crack stage.
3. Add almonds and continue cooking, stirring, until it reaches the hard-crack stage.
4. Pour the toffee immediately onto an unbuttered cookie sheet, spreading as thin as possible.
5. Place chocolate pieces on top of the hot toffee and spread the melting chocolate evenly over the toffee.
